cityDNA.coreFantasy: A dark-elven forest aristocracy where nightglass palaces, alchemical labs, black-market arcades, archives, opera courts, and lower-district survival make beauty a tool of control.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Nox Vaelor is beautiful first and threatening second; the uploaded images show the danger in how carefully access, light, routes, and lower-district pressure are managed.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Nox Vaelor turns altered forest, moonlit crystal, alchemical secrecy, archives, performance, informal leverage, and lower-district survival into a layered social machine.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Dark wood, slate, silver, stained glass, arcane glow, black marble, violet crystal, shadow trees, alchemy vapors, archive towers, opera courts, hidden markets, scrap stalls, and moonlit walkways.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Dark-elven aristocratic culture built on access control, discretion, beauty, contract, performance, and leverage.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Nightglass, thorn geometry, moonlight, violet crystals, veils, masks, gold seals, serpent geometry, hidden paths, opera curtains, and scrap lanterns symbolize elegant power.

canonLocks: Seat of Power: Star Map Ceilings Veiled High Court.
Districts: Arcane / Alchemical Labs, Underworld / Hidden Economy, Records / Archives, Entertainment / Theater, Slums / Informal Settlement.

Exact uploaded anchors include Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Alchemy Lab Beacon, Blue-Lamp Monument, Formula Archive Nook, Underworld / Hidden Economy Civic Hall, Black Market Arcade, Mist Veils Monument, Understreet Vault Nook, Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, Copyist Hall Nook, Entertainment / Theater Civic Hall, Opera Court, Entertainment Theater Lantern Monument, Mask Pavilion Nook, Slums / Informal Settlement Civic Hall, Scrap Market, Slums Informal Settlement Lantern Monument, and Patched Tenement Nook.
provisionalCanon: The city's highest virtue is influence.
The image pass reinforces moonlit forest aristocracy with visible lower-district and performance systems, not a flat evil city.
cautionFlags: Make the city alluring and socially intelligent before threatening.
Keep lower districts exploited but alive, not background decay.

environment.environmentalLogic: The uploaded images show a city that transforms forest into social architecture: routes are public, purchased, inherited, hidden, or forbidden.

forms: Star Map Ceilings Veiled High Court
skyline: Star Map Ceilings Veiled High Court as authority
archive tower, opera court, black-market arcade, scrap market, crystal estates, and shadow trees layered together

civilization.people: Citizens are elegant, observant, transactional, and socially aware; aristocrats manage privacy and posture while lower districts remain adaptive and alive.
civilization.governance: Government blends family leverage, access control, sealed records, star-map ceremony, alchemical regulation, and tolerated hidden economies.
civilization.religion: Moonlight, thorn geometry, shadow groves, veiled rites, nightglass symbolism, and ritualized forest transformation legitimize order.

streets.appearance: Beautiful, moonlit, shadowed, and layered with dark stone paths, shadowed roots, elevated walkways, velvet awnings, violet lamps, alchemical vapors, opera courts, hidden markets, and scrap-lit lower streets.
streets.movement: Movement follows moonlit streets, elevated walkways, estate stairs, tree platforms, private routes, under-vault passages, theater courts, and lower-district alleys.
streets.lighting: Night is the city's true language: violet lamps, moonlight, crystal glow, warm theater windows, and silver highlights.
streets.weatherEffects: Rain deepens reflections and makes shadow trees feel alive.
streets.dayCycle: Late morning is quieter; afternoon brings contracts, archives, labs, market traffic, and estate movement.
streets.nightCycle: Night awakens salons, theater, hidden trade, ritual groves, and lower-district food.

housing.wealthy: Crystal-lit estates and balconied manors with guarded approaches and private platforms.
housing.middle: Archive, theater, market, and laboratory households with curtained balconies.
housing.poor: Lower forest dwellings, patched tenements, reed pavilions, scrap roofs, shared fires, and warm windows under shadowed branches.

districts.name: Arcane / Alchemical Labs
districts.civicPurpose: Alchemical authority, formula control, experimental leverage, and public signal identity.
districts.visualIdentity: Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Alchemy Lab Beacon, Blue-Lamp Monument, Formula Archive Nook.

districts.name: Underworld / Hidden Economy
districts.civicPurpose: Hidden markets, vault debts, informal leverage, and tolerated illegality beneath aristocratic order.
districts.visualIdentity: Underworld / Hidden Economy Civic Hall, Black Market Arcade, Mist Veils Monument, Understreet Vault Nook.

districts.name: Records / Archives
districts.civicPurpose: Official memory, family records, sealed archives, contracts, and bureaucratic control.
districts.visualIdentity: Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, Copyist Hall Nook.

districts.name: Entertainment / Theater
districts.civicPurpose: Culture, performance, patronage, public spectacle, and controlled indulgence.
districts.visualIdentity: Entertainment / Theater Civic Hall, Opera Court, Entertainment Theater Lantern Monument, Mask Pavilion Nook.

districts.name: Slums / Informal Settlement
districts.civicPurpose: Lower-district survival, repair culture, tolerated pressure, scrap trade, and life beneath elite management.
districts.visualIdentity: Slums / Informal Settlement Civic Hall, Scrap Market, Slums Informal Settlement Lantern Monument, Patched Tenement Nook.

wonder.name: Dark-Elven Nightglass Thorn Palace
wonder.symbolicRole: Beauty made from shadow, forest, crystal, memory, and controlled transformation.
wonder.visualRole: Nightglass and thorn palace with violet glow, black stone, stained glass, shadow trees, and moonlight refraction.
wonder.civicRole: Aristocratic ceremonies, night festivals, ritual observances, private meetings, and access-control events.
storyHooks: A repair scar on the palace marks a family debt everyone calls ornamental.

beacon.name: Alchemy Lab Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: Warning filtered through knowledge, secrecy, and controlled danger.
beacon.visualRole: Civic blue alchemical signal integrated with labs, retorts, runes, vapors, and sealed jars.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates lab response, archive alerts, aristocratic warnings, and rumor spread.
storyHooks: A Beacon change makes each class reveal what it fears losing.

seatOfPower.name: Star Map Ceilings Veiled High Court
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Aristocratic authority, celestial hierarchy, and aestheticized governance.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Dark high court with star-map ceilings, guarded entrances, balconies, sealed archives, and shadowed trees.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Petitions, contract registration, aristocratic hearings, private audiences, and lineage displays.
storyHooks: An access rule exposes whether birth, money, favor, debt, or threat governs the city.

majorLandmarks.name: Black Market Arcade
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Market arcade with vault doors, mist veils, masks, and subterranean passages.
storyHooks: A broker sells the part of a record the archive sealed.

majorLandmarks.name: Archive Tower
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Archive tower with gold seals, copyist hall, ledger stacks, and vault windows.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Contracts, family records, and sealed histories.
storyHooks: A copyist hall proves the official family history is staged.

majorLandmarks.name: Opera Court
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Opera court with lantern monument, masks, curtains, and acoustic shells.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Performance, patronage, spectacle, and social commentary.
storyHooks: A mask pavilion makes private leverage public.

majorLandmarks.name: Scrap Market
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Scrap stalls, patched tenements, lower fires, salvage roofs, and lanterns.
storyHooks: The lower district repairs what the palace pretends never broke.

mapBackgroundGuidance: Keep Nightglass Thorn Palace, Alchemy Lab Beacon, and Star Map Ceilings Veiled High Court legible together.
Use moonlit forest, violet lamps, alchemy, hidden arcades, archives, opera courts, and lower scrap districts.
requiredVisualElements: Star Map Ceilings Veiled High Court
elementsToAvoid: lower districts treated as abandoned ruin
